title: TransDigm Announces Acquisition of DART Aerospace
text: CLEVELAND, March 14, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- TransDigm Group Incorporated (NYSE: TDG), announced today that it has entered into a definitive agreement to acquire DART Aerospace ("DART" or "the Company"), a portfolio company of Greenbriar Equity Group, L.P. and First Aviation Services Inc., for approximately $360 million in cash.
